description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named compiler-python-build that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix job that runs on ubuntu-18.04, windows-2019, and macos-10.15, checking out the repository, setting up Python 3.7 and ninja, installing cibuildwheel, and building a wheel with cibuildwheel. Upload the build artifact to GitHub, with different artifact names for Windows, Linux, and macOS.
